---
title: Post With Description Field
date: 2024-08-10 11:00:00
tags: [description, metadata]
categories: [Content]
description: This summary comes from the description field, not preview or body content.
---

This post uses the description field instead of preview. The summary priority chain is preview > description > excerpt > auto-generated.

Since no preview is set, the description field should be used as the summary in the manifest. This body text should NOT appear in the summary.

Extra paragraph to ensure the auto-generated summary would differ from the description.
